Description
com.societegenerale.failover.core.observable
Observable SPI and core implementations for the failover lifecycle.
com.societegenerale.failover.core.observable.publisher
Observable publisher SPI and built-in implementations.

  • Uses of Metrics in com.societegenerale.failover.core.observable

    Methods in com.societegenerale.failover.core.observable that return Metrics
    Modifier and Type
    Method
    Description
    Metrics
    Metrics.collect(String key, boolean value)
    boolean overload of collect(String, String) — removes the repeated Boolean.toString(...) noise at call sites (audit A-3/Q-2).
    Metrics
    Metrics.collect(String key, long value)
    long overload of collect(String, String) — removes the repeated Long.toString(...) noise at call sites (audit A-3/Q-2).
    Metrics
    Metrics.collect(String key, String value)
    Adds a key-value pair to this metrics bag, prefixing the key with "failover-".
    static Metrics
    Metrics.of(String name)
    Creates a new Metrics instance pre-populated with a name entry.
